name: inventory-lens
description: Public Roblox inventory analyzer for exact copies, collector context, and local collection graphics.

scripts.build:web: tsc -b && vite build --config vite.web.config.ts && node scripts/verify-web-build.mjs
scripts.verify:web: pnpm run test && pnpm run lint && pnpm run build:web && pnpm run secrets:check
scripts.release:package: pnpm run test && pnpm run lint && pnpm run build && pnpm run security:check && pnpm run secrets:check && node scripts/package-release.mjs
